name: Peanut Butterscotch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Cream together the butter and packed brown sugar until light and fluffy. Add the peanut butter and eggs, mixing well. Stir in the flour and baking soda, then blend well. Add the peanuts and chocolate chips; mix just until combined.
2. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough two inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
3. Bake for 9-12 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately and cool on a wire rack.
